videos.video_subject: Messi strikes again for Argentina against Austria at the FIFA World Cup 2026 - Austria had no answer for the 38 year old GOAT who scored in a 2-0 win
videos.video_script: Austria thought they had a plan to stop Lionel Messi. They were wrong. At thirty eight years old, Messi strikes again for Argentina at the World Cup. One touch to kill the ball, one look up, and the defender was already beaten. Austria had no answer for him all game long. Argentina win it two nil and the whole stadium went silent. The greatest of all time is still writing history at this World Cup. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Lionel Messi Argentina goal celebration, Lionel Messi light blue and white Argentina jersey, Lionel Messi World Cup celebration close up, Lionel Messi dribbling past a defender, Lionel Messi screaming celebration arms out, Lionel Messi Argentina captain armband, Lionel Messi free kick Argentina, Lionel Messi close up face celebrating, Argentina World Cup 2026 Messi, Lionel Messi pointing to the sky celebration
